MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: Try to remember a period when you were in a 'high' state. Indicate Yes/No whether each statement applied.
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: Hypomania checklist. The 16 'high'-state symptom items hcl16_3_1-hcl16_3_16 (Yes/No) constitute the scored checklist; the remaining items (current/usual state, impact and course questions) are auxiliary and not part of the total.

hcl16_1.Description: First of all, how are you feeling TODAY compared to your usual state:(Please mark only ONE of the following)

Levels.0: Neither better nor worse than usual

hcl16_2.Description: How are you USUALLY compared to other people? Independently of how you feel today, please tell us how you are normally compared to other people, by marking which of the following statements describes you best. Compared to other people my level of activity, energy and mood...(Please mark only ONE of the following)

Levels.3: ...repeatedly shows periods of ups and downs.

hcl16_3_3.Description: I want to travel and/or do travel more.

hcl16_3_4.Description: I spend more money/too much money.

hcl16_3_5.Description: I take more risks in my daily life (in my work and/or other activities).

hcl16_3_6.Description: I am physically more active (sport etc.).

hcl16_3_7.Description: I am less shy or inhibited.

hcl16_3_8.Description: I wear more colourful and more extravagant clothes/make-up.

hcl16_3_9.Description: I am more flirtatious and/or am more sexually active.

hcl16_3_11.Description: I make more jokes or puns when I am talking.

hcl16_3_13.Description: My mood is higher, more optimistic.

hcl16_3_16.Description: I take more drugs (sedatives, anti-anxiety pills, stimulants...).

hcl16_4.Description: Did the questions above, which characterize a "high", describe how you are...(Please mark only ONE of the following)

hcl16_6.Description: Other people's reactions and comments to your "highs". How did people close to you react to or comment on your

hcl16_7.Description: Length of your "highs" as a rule (on the average):(Please mark only ONE of the following)

hcl16_8.Description: Have you experienced such "highs" in the past twelve months?

hcl16_9.Description: If yes, please estimate how many days you spent in "highs" during the last twelve months:Taking all together: about ______ days

hcl_score_total.Description: HCL-16 total: sum of the 16 'high'-symptom items hcl16_3_1-hcl16_3_16 (Yes=1, No=0). Range 0-16. n/a if any of the 16 items is missing.
